title: NebulaOptimized
description: NebulaOptimized is a Minecraft mod crafted to boost FPS and enhance game performance.
body:
**NebulaOptimized offers an enhanced Minecraft experience with optimal performance and FPS, presenting a thoughtfully curated mod pack meticulously crafted to boost FPS and optimize overall game efficiency**

**Mods folder download: [Click here](https://nebulaoptimized.pages.dev/NebulaOptimized.zip)**
